title: Mengdie
description: Mengdie Zhao is an Assistant Professor of Global China Studies at NYU Shanghai. She is a scholar of Chinese literature with interests in legal history and gender studies. She received her PhD in Chinese literature from Harvard University in 2022. Before joining NYU Shanghai, she was a Postdoctoral
text:
